scale.description: Stable performance in all environments, from 5-person small meetings to conferences with over 1,000 participants.

items.text: We used Knoc at an international conference and were very satisfied with the accuracy and speed of real-time translation. The participants' response was great, and most importantly, the preparation process was simple.
items.name: Kim OO

items.text: I was surprised that even medical terminology was translated accurately. Thanks to the boosting model, we were able to conduct international seminars smoothly without professional interpreters.
items.name: Lee OO

pricing.title: Pricing

ctaBanner.title: Need an even larger scale?
ctaBanner.description: For large events or special requirements, please feel free to contact us. We will propose the optimal solution.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Check out answers to common questions about our service

items.question: What is the difference between pay-as-you-go and contract?
items.answer: Pay As You Go is a prepaid credit system where you purchase credit packs before use. Custom plans are monthly subscriptions set up through consultation, suitable for large events or regular use.

items.question: Is there a minimum usage time?
items.answer: There is no minimum usage time for Pay As You Go. Custom plan terms are negotiable.

items.question: What are the payment methods?
items.answer: Pay As You Go uses prepaid credit packs. Custom plans are billed as monthly subscriptions.

items.question: Which plan should I choose?
items.answer: We recommend Pay As You Go for small meetings or simple tests, and Custom plans for institutions or companies with regular use.

items.question: What is automatic language recognition and switching?
items.answer: The system automatically recognizes whatever language the speaker uses, and participants can select their preferred language in the subtitle room to see translations in their own language. Multilingual communication is possible without prior language surveys.

items.question: What is the industry-specific boosting model?
items.answer: It is an AI model optimized for more accurate translation of specialized terminology in fields such as medicine, law, IT, and finance. Available with all plans.

items.question: What languages are supported?
items.answer: We support 101 languages including major languages like English, Chinese, Japanese, and Spanish. All languages support bidirectional translation and are continuously updated.

items.question: How accurate is the translation?
items.answer: We guarantee over 95% accuracy in general conversation and up to 99% accuracy in specialized fields with boosting models applied.

items.question: How many people can use it simultaneously?
items.answer: Pay As You Go allows up to 300 participants per room with 1 simultaneous room. Custom plans have participant limits and simultaneous rooms configured based on consultation.

items.question: Do I need to install a separate app?
items.answer: No, you can use it immediately with just a Chrome browser. Available on all devices including mobile, tablet, and laptop.

section1.title: Personal Information We Collect
section1.description: We collect the following personal information for interpretation quote requests and service provision.
section1.items: Company name (Organization), Name, Position, Mobile phone, Email, Interpretation language, Type of interpretation, Interpretation date/time, Interpretation details, Venue, Materials, Cookies, etc.

section2.title: Purpose of Collection and Use
section2.description: We use the collected personal information for the following purposes.
purposes: Interpretation quote consultation, service provision and contract fulfillment
Customer management, inquiry response and dispute resolution
Service improvement and new service development
Marketing and advertising information (with prior consent)

section3.title: Retention and Use Period
section3.description: We destroy personal information without delay after the purpose of collection and use has been achieved. However, the following information is retained for the periods specified below.

internal.title: Retention by Internal Policy
internal.reason: Dispute resolution and customer inquiry record retention

legal.title: Retention by Applicable Laws
legal.description: When required to retain information under applicable laws such as the Commercial Act and the Act on Consumer Protection in Electronic Commerce, we retain information for the period specified by law.

items.label: Records of payment and supply of goods:
Records of consumer complaints or disputes:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.effectiveNotice: These terms are effective from May 25, 2025.

sections.title: Purpose
sections.content: These Terms of Service aim to establish the terms and conditions of use and operation of the services provided by "Elnino" (hereinafter referred to as 'the Site').

sections.title: Definitions
sections.description: The main terms used in these terms are defined as follows.

definitions.definition: A user who has agreed to the Site's terms, provided personal information for registration, entered into a service agreement with the Site, and uses the Site.
A contract entered into between the Site and a member regarding the use of the Site.
A unique combination of letters and numbers assigned to each member for identification and service use.
A combination of letters and numbers selected by the member to verify their identity and protect their rights.
The operator who establishes and operates a website for the service.
The act of a member canceling their service agreement.

sections.title: Rules Outside the Terms
sections.content: The operator may separately announce operational policies when necessary, and if these terms and operational policies overlap, the operational policies shall take precedence.

sections.title: Formation of Service Agreement
items: The service agreement is formed when a person wishing to use the Site as a member agrees to these terms and applies for membership, and the operator approves the application.
A person wishing to register as a member and use the service agrees to these terms by reading them and selecting 'I Agree' below during the membership application process.

sections.title: Service Application
items: Users wishing to register as members and use the Site must provide the required information (User ID, Password, Nickname, etc.) requested by the Site.
Members who register using others' information or false information cannot claim any rights related to Site use and may be subject to penalties under applicable laws.

sections.title: Privacy Policy
items: The Site and operator do not store passwords provided during membership registration, and related matters follow the Site's Privacy Policy.
The operator strives to protect members' personal information, including registration information, in accordance with applicable laws.

sections.title: Operator's Obligations
items: The operator shall process legitimate opinions or complaints raised by members as quickly as possible.
The operator may request the Site to repair or restore equipment without delay when failures or losses occur to ensure continuous and stable site operation.

sections.title: Member's Obligations
items: Members must comply with the provisions of these terms, regulations established by the operator, notices, operational policies announced by the Site, and applicable laws.
Members may not transfer, gift, or use as collateral their service usage rights or other contractual status to others without the explicit consent of the Site.
Users must exercise considerable care in managing their ID and password.
Members must not infringe upon the intellectual property rights of the operator, the Site, or third parties.
